### 2305442
**Total Drama Island S01E05 - Jurassic Fart**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:02  
⌛ May 30, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305442&mediaid=46443d7c8b0b0270372c0865b7989a2d221943f2) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/jurassic-fart-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305442` mediaid=`46443d7c8b0b0270372c0865b7989a2d221943f2`  
_After an all-bean breakfast the teams must cross the island in silence to avoid being eaten by raptors. That's right, this episode has dinosaurs... and lots of farting. The first team to reach the other side claims victory._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305442_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2305446
**Total Drama Island S01E09 - Paddle Field Earth**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:02  
⌛ May 30, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305446&mediaid=8267cea636d32b110ef015fedbf6ea34430bd128) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/paddle-field-earth-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305446` mediaid=`8267cea636d32b110ef015fedbf6ea34430bd128`  
_Today's challenge involves canoeing, hiking and mountain climbing. It's just like normal summer camp!! Except that you canoe over a waterfall, hike through a geyser field and climb a mountain that's actually the world's biggest beehive. It's nothing like summer camp._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305446_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2305443
**Total Drama Island S01E06 - Launch Back of Notre Game**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:03  
⌛ May 30, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305443&mediaid=a9907661d78e128b822b22aaae71ff173367b555) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/launch-back-of-notre-game-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305443` mediaid=`a9907661d78e128b822b22aaae71ff173367b555`  
_Catapult your team member into distant scoring zones to earn points but if you miss you'll be landing in a penalty zone filled with all kind of evil. The first team to reach 10,000 points wins. The losing team, as always, will be sending someone home._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305443_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
### 2305444
**Total Drama Island S01E07 - Severe Eggs & Pains**  
TV-PG 🔒 22:02  
⌛ May 30, 2026 at 23:59:00 EDT  
[Open in app](https://cnvideo.sercomkc.org/redirector.html?type=cnapp&seriesid=2305437&titleid=2305444&mediaid=cd4dc75ff3500fb6b4b804480db5e364fc8046e5) or on the web: https://www.cartoonnetwork.com/video/total-drama-island/severe-eggs--pains-episode.html  
seriesid=`2305437` titleid=`2305444` mediaid=`cd4dc75ff3500fb6b4b804480db5e364fc8046e5`  
_Chris responds to the network's ask for a holiday special by making the campers hunt for eggs. With the teams now merged it's all about being the first one back with an egg and winning immunity. Well, and not getting gutted by a giant bird._  
<a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_001_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_001_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_002_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_002_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_003_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_003_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_004_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_004_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_005_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_005_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_006_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_006_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_007_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_007_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_008_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_008_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_009_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_009_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a><a href="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_010_1280x720.jpg"><img src="https://i.cartoonnetwork.com/orchestrator/2305444_010_640x360.jpg" height="144px" /></a>
